description: Tracks contractor prospects from first contact through active billing

stages.name: Prospect Identified
stages.description: Contractor found via Google Maps, Yelp, Angi, or referral. Not yet contacted.

stages.name: Outreach Sent
stages.description: Email or call attempted. Awaiting response.

stages.name: Connected
stages.description: Had a conversation. Contractor is interested and considering.

stages.name: Trial Lead Sent
stages.description: Free trial lead delivered. Awaiting contractor feedback.

stages.name: Proposal Sent
stages.description: Pricing and terms sent. Awaiting agreement.

stages.name: Closed — Active
stages.description: Contractor is signed and receiving leads. Billing active.

stages.name: Churned
stages.description: Was active, cancelled or stopped paying.
